customer-support-spe-velora-28696276.summary: Provides solution-oriented customer support for nonprofit organizations using Aplos platform, resolving issues across multiple channels while advocating for customer needs.

senior-technical-sup-velora-28696276.summary: Senior Technical Support Engineer resolves complex technical issues across Aplos, Raisely, and Keela using AI tools like Cursor to build automation, incident response, and knowledge systems while bridging customer support, engineering, and product teams.
